Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other net equals Other income expense net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: (Gains) losses on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - (Gains) losses on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Investing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired + Other

formulas.formula: Financing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Oct 27 2024)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 28 2024)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings
cross_statement_checks.detail: Retained earnings Jan 28 2024: 29817; Retained earnings Oct 27 2024: 53950; Change: 24133. Net income: 50789; Dividends charged to RE: 589; Share repurchases charged to RE (XBRL value from retained earnings member context c-39): 26067; Net: 50789 - 589 - 26067 = 24133

operating_leases.current_location: Hidden inside Accrued and other current liabilities on balance sheet face per OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList tag pointing to AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent; disclosed in Note 2 lease maturity table as short-term operating lease liabilities of 273

components.label: Depreciation and amortization (single line on CF statement)

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The CF statement shows a single combined D&A line of 1321. Note 8 discloses amortization of intangible assets separately at 438 million for the nine months ended Oct 27 2024. The remaining 883 million is depreciation of PP&E and other amortization

accounts_payable.source: Balance sheet face shows Accounts payable separately from Accrued and other current liabilities; XBRL concept us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent at 5353 is pure trade AP

accounts_receivable.source: Balance sheet face shows Accounts receivable, net separately; XBRL concept us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent at 17693

capex.source: CF line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets uses concept us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets at 2159. A separate financing activity line Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets at 97 (nvda:PaymentsForFinancedPropertyPlantAndEquipmentAndIntangibleAssetsFinancingActivities) represents financed purchases paid during period

short_term_debt.note: Balance sheet shows Short-term debt as zero at Oct 27 2024 per XBRL concept us-gaap:DebtCurrent. The 0.584% Notes Due 2024 were repaid in Q2 FY2025. No commercial paper outstanding as of Oct 27 2024

interest_expense.source: IS shows Interest expense separately at 186 (nine months, us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating) and Interest income at 1275 (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest). These are presented as separate gross line items on the income statement, not netted

flags: Effective rate of 13.6% is well below statutory 21% due to FDII deduction, stock-based compensation benefits, and R&D tax credits per Note 5

inventory.source: Note 9 Balance Sheet Components inventory table discloses breakdown; XBRL concepts InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves, InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves, InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves

items_corrected: Other: sign corrected from +365 to -365 (item appears in parentheses in filing indicating a cash reduction)

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other net equals Other income expense net
Operating income plus Other income expense net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus working capital changes equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Investing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
Financing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
CFO plus CFI plus CFF equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
